---
title: "&nbsp;"
output: 
    html_document:
        include:
            #before_body: header.html
            after_body: footer.html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## **Opportunities**<br>
<hr>

<div class="row">

<div class="col-md-4" style="text-align:center;">

<img src="Portrait/Default.png" style="width:80%; max-width:220px;">

</div>

<div class="col-md-8">

### Get in touch

I am about to join [the University of Hong Kong](https://www.hku.hk/) in the coming summer of 2026.<br>

I am recruiting:<br>

- Postdoctoral fellows  

- PhD and MPhil students  

- Research assistants  

- Undergraduate interns  

If you are interested in joining the lab, let's talk about your research interests, skills and plans.<br>

Prospective students and postdocs are encouraged to read [our publications](publications.html) and [contact me](mailto:chensichong0528@gmail.com) before applying officially.
